   747→async def _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page: Page, name: str, company: str) -> Optional[str]:
   748→    """Try to extract profile URL for a candidate from the DOM contactcard pattern.
   749→
   750→    Searches the current page for a contactcard element whose parent card
   751→    contains the candidate's name (and optionally company), then constructs
   752→    the profile URL from the extracted user ID.
   753→
   754→    Args:
   755→        page: Playwright page on the search results
   756→        name: Candidate name to match
   757→        company: Candidate company to help disambiguate
   758→
   759→    Returns:
   760→        Profile URL string, or None if not found
   761→    """
   762→    try:
   763→        user_id = await page.evaluate('''(args) => {
   764→            const { name, company } = args;
   765→            // Check contactcard_{numeric_id} ancestors
   766→            const ccElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   767→            for (const el of ccElements) {
   768→                const text = el.textContent || '';
   769→                if (!text.includes(name)) continue;
   770→                if (company && !text.includes(company)) continue;
   771→                const match = el.id.match(/^contactcard_(\\d+)$/);
   772→                if (match) return match[1];
   773→            }
   774→            // Check member_entry_{numeric_id} descendants
   775→            const meElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="member_entry_"]');
   776→            for (const el of meElements) {
   777→                // Walk up to find the card containing this member_entry
   778→                let card = el.parentElement;
   779→                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
   780→                    const text = card.textContent || '';
   781→                    if (text.includes(name) && (!company || text.includes(company))) {
   782→                        const match = el.id.match(/^member_entry_(\\d+)$/);
   783→                        if (match) return match[1];
   784→                    }
   785→                    card = card.parentElement;
   786→                }
   787→            }
   788→            return null;
   789→        }''', {'name': name, 'company': company})
   790→
   791→        if user_id:
   792→            profile_url = f"https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/{user_id}?dstu={user_id}"
   793→            logger.info(f"Resolved profile_url for '{name}' via contactcard: {profile_url}")
   794→            return profile_url
   795→
   796→        logger.debug(f"No contactcard found for '{name}'")
   797→        return None
   798→
   799→    except Exception as e:
   800→        logger.debug(f"_click_avatar_for_profile_url error for '{name}': {e}")
   801→        return None
   802→
   803→
   804→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   805→# Enterprise recruitment path (Path B)
   806→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   807→
   808→MAIMAI_HOME_URL = "https://maimai.cn"
   809→ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER = "ent/talents/discover"
   810→
   811→
   812→async def search_candidates_enterprise(
   813→    keywords: str,
   814→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
   815→    pages: int = 1,
   816→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   817→    keep_tab_open: bool = False,
   818→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   819→    """Search for candidates via the enterprise recruitment path.
   820→
   821→    Flow:
   822→    1. Switch to primary tab -> navigate to homepage -> click "招聘" tab (opens new tab)
   823→    2. Wait for enterprise page to load
   824→    3. Add keyword filter -> submit
   825→    4. Optionally add company filter
   826→    5. Extract candidates from enterprise card layout
   827→    6. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
   828→    7. Close enterprise tab unless keep_tab_open is True
   829→
   830→    Args:
   831→        keywords: Search keywords
   832→        company: Filter by company names (optional)
   833→        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
   834→        browser: Browser manager instance
   835→        keep_tab_open: If True, leave enterprise tab open (for inline messaging)
   836→
   837→    Returns:
   838→        List of CandidateBasic objects
   839→    """
   840→    validate_keywords(keywords)
   841→
   842→    if browser is None:
   843→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   844→
   845→    config = get_config()
   846→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   847→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   848→
   849→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   850→
   851→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   852→    enterprise_tab_opened = False
   853→
   854→    with Progress(
   855→        SpinnerColumn(),
   856→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   857→        console=console,
   858→    ) as progress:
   859→        task = progress.add_task("Opening enterprise recruitment...", total=None)
   860→
   861→        try:
   862→            await async_check_rate_limit("search")
   863→
   864→            # Always start from the primary tab to avoid navigating user's open content
   865→            browser.switch_to_primary_tab()
   866→            page = browser.page
   867→
   868→            # Step 1: Navigate to homepage and click 招聘 tab
   869→            await retry_navigation(page, MAIMAI_HOME_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   870→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
   871→
   872→            sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.recruitment_tab")
   873→            recruitment_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=5000)
   874→            if not recruitment_tab:
   875→                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find recruitment tab: {sel}")
   876→
   877→            # Click opens a new tab — use BrowserManager API
   878→            await recruitment_tab.click()
   879→            page = await browser.wait_for_new_tab(timeout=15000)
   880→            enterprise_tab_opened = True
   881→
   882→            progress.update(task, description="Enterprise page loaded")
   883→
   884→            # Wait for the enterprise page URL
   885→            try:
   886→                await page.wait_for_url(
   887→                    lambda url: ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER in url,
   888→                    timeout=15000,
   889→                )
   890→            except Exception:
   891→                logger.warning(f"Enterprise URL marker not found, current URL: {page.url}")
   892→
   893→            await async_random_delay("action")
   894→
   895→            # Step 2: Add keyword
   896→            progress.update(task, description=f"Adding keyword: {keywords}")
   897→
   898→            add_kw_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_keyword_button")
   899→            add_kw_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_kw_sel, timeout=5000)
   900→            if add_kw_btn:
   901→                await add_kw_btn.click()
   902→                await async_random_delay("action")
   903→
   904→            kw_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_input")
   905→            await page.wait_for_selector(kw_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   906→            await human_type(page, kw_input_sel, keywords)
   907→            await async_random_delay("action")
   908→
   909→            kw_submit_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_submit")
   910→            submit_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(kw_submit_sel, timeout=3000)
   911→            if submit_btn:
   912→                await submit_btn.click()
   913→                await async_random_delay("page_load")
   914→
   915→            # Step 3: Add company filter if specified
   916→            if company:
   917→                progress.update(task, description="Adding company filter...")
   918→                add_co_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_company_button")
   919→                add_co_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_co_sel, timeout=5000)
   920→                if add_co_btn:
   921→                    await add_co_btn.click()
   922→                    await async_random_delay("action")
   923→
   924→                co_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.company_input")
   925→                for co_name in company:
   926→                    await page.wait_for_selector(co_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   927→                    await human_type(page, co_input_sel, co_name)
   928→                    await async_random_delay("action")
   929→
   930→                    # Click suggestion dropdown item
   931→                    try:
   932→                        suggestion = await page.wait_for_selector(
   933→                            f"text='{co_name}'", timeout=3000
   934→                        )
   935→                        if suggestion:
   936→                            await suggestion.click()
   937→                            await async_random_delay("action")
   938→                    except Exception:
   939→                        logger.debug(f"Company suggestion not found for: {co_name}")
   940→
   941→            # Step 4: Wait for results and extract
   942→            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
   943→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   944→
   945→            for page_num in range(1, pages + 1):
   946→                progress.update(task, description=f"Extracting page {page_num}/{pages}...")
   947→
   948→                candidates = await _extract_enterprise_results(page)
   949→
   950→                if not candidates:
   951→                    logger.info(f"No enterprise results on page {page_num}")
   952→                    break
   953→
   954→                # Filter non-R&D roles
   955→                before_filter = len(candidates)
   956→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   957→                filtered = before_filter - len(candidates)
   958→                if filtered > 0:
   959→                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   960→
   961→                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   962→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   963→
   964→                rate_limiter.log_action("search", {
   965→                    "keywords": keywords,
   966→                    "page": page_num,
   967→                    "results": len(candidates),
   968→                    "mode": "enterprise",
   969→                })
   970→
   971→                _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
   972→
   973→                # Scroll for next page (infinite scroll)
   974→                if page_num < pages:
   975→                    await human_scroll(page, "down", distance=800)
   976→                    await async_random_delay("page_load")
   977→                    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   978→
   979→        except Exception as e:
   980→            logger.error(f"Enterprise search error: {e}")
   981→            await browser.screenshot("enterprise_search_error")
   982→            progress.update(task, description=f"Error: {str(e)[:40]}")
   983→        finally:
   984→            # Close the enterprise tab unless caller wants it open for inline messaging
   985→            if enterprise_tab_opened and not keep_tab_open:
   986→                try:
   987→                    await browser.close_current_tab()
   988→                except Exception:
   989→                    pass
   990→
   991→    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, None, pages, len(all_candidates))
   992→
   993→    console.print(f"[green]Enterprise search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
   994→    return all_candidates
   995→
   996→
   997→async def _extract_enterprise_results(page: Page) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   998→    """Extract candidate information from enterprise recruitment results page.
   999→
  1000→    The enterprise UI has a different card layout from search_center.
  1001→    Uses JS-based extraction tailored to the enterprise talent cards.
  1002→
  1003→    Args:
  1004→        page: Playwright page instance on the enterprise results page
  1005→
  1006→    Returns:
  1007→        List of CandidateBasic objects
  1008→    """
  1009→    candidates = []
  1010→
  1011→    try:
  1012→        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=10000)
  1013→    except Exception:
  1014→        pass
  1015→
  1016→    try:
  1017→        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1018→            const candidates = [];
  1019→            const seenIds = new Set();
  1020→
  1021→            // Enterprise talent cards typically have a structured layout
  1022→            // Try multiple selectors for the card containers
  1023→            const cardSelectors = [
  1024→                '[class*="talent-card"]',
  1025→                '[class*="candidate-card"]',
  1026→                '[class*="recommend-card"]',
  1027→                '[class*="talent-item"]',
  1028→                '[class*="card-wrap"]',
  1029→            ];
  1030→
  1031→            let cards = [];
  1032→            for (const sel of cardSelectors) {
  1033→                cards = document.querySelectorAll(sel);
  1034→                if (cards.length > 0) break;
  1035→            }
  1036→
  1037→            // Fallback: find cards by avatar image pattern (same as search_center)
  1038→            if (cards.length === 0) {
  1039→                const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
  1040→                const foundCards = [];
  1041→
  1042→                for (const img of images) {
  1043→                    const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
  1044→                    if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
  1045→                    if (rect.width < 30 || rect.height < 30) continue;
  1046→
  1047→                    let card = img.parentElement;
  1048→                    for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
  1049→                        const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
  1050→                        if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 80) {
  1051→                            break;
  1052→                        }
  1053→                        card = card.parentElement;
  1054→                    }
  1055→                    if (card) foundCards.push(card);
  1056→                }
  1057→                cards = foundCards;
  1058→            }
  1059→
  1060→            for (const card of cards) {
  1061→                const textParts = [];
  1062→                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
  1063→                while (walker.nextNode()) {
  1064→                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
  1065→                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 100) {
  1066→                        textParts.push(text);
  1067→                    }
  1068→                }
  1069→
  1070→                let name = '';
  1071→                let company = '';
  1072→                let title = '';
  1073→
  1074→                const skipPatterns = [
  1075→                    /^立即沟通$/,
  1076→                    /^不合适$/,
  1077→                    /^感兴趣$/,
  1078→                    /^不感兴趣$/,
  1079→                    /^(\\d+\\s*)?年/,
  1080→                    /^[|｜·]$/,
  1081→                    /^在线|^离线|^活跃/,
  1082→                ];
  1083→
  1084→                const isSkippable = (text) => {
  1085→                    return skipPatterns.some(p => p.test(text));
  1086→                };
  1087→
  1088→                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
  1089→                    const part = textParts[i];
  1090→                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
  1091→
  1092→                    if (!name && part.length >= 2 && part.length <= 15) {
  1093→                        if (/^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5a-zA-Z·\\s]+$/.test(part)) {
  1094→                            name = part;
  1095→                            continue;
  1096→                        }
  1097→                    }
  1098→
  1099→                    if (name && !company && part.length > 1) {
  1100→                        company = part;
  1101→                        continue;
  1102→                    }
  1103→
  1104→                    if (name && company && !title && part.length > 1) {
  1105→                        title = part;
  1106→                        break;
  1107→                    }
  1108→                }
  1109→
  1110→                if (!name) continue;
  1111→
  1112→                const idSource = (name || '') + '|' + (company || '') + '|' + (title || '');
  1113→                let hash = 0;
  1114→                for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
  1115→                    const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
  1116→                    hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
  1117→                    hash = hash & hash;
  1118→                }
  1119→                const maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
  1120→
  1121→                if (seenIds.has(maimaiId)) continue;
  1122→                seenIds.add(maimaiId);
  1123→
  1124→                // Try to extract profile URL
  1125→                let profileUrl = '';
  1126→                const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
  1127→                for (const link of links) {
  1128→                    const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
  1129→                    if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('dstu=') || href.includes('egid=')) {
  1130→                        profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
  1131→                        break;
  1132→                    }
  1133→                }
  1134→
  1135→                candidates.push({
  1136→                    name: name,
  1137→                    title: title || '',
  1138→                    company: company || '',
  1139→                    maimai_id: maimaiId,
  1140→                    profile_url: profileUrl,
  1141→                    location: '',
  1142→                });
  1143→            }
  1144→
  1145→            return candidates;
  1146→        }''')
  1147→
  1148→        logger.info(f"Enterprise extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")
  1149→
  1150→        for data in candidates_data:
  1151→            if data.get("name"):
  1152→                candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
  1153→                    maimai_id=data.get("maimai_id", ""),
  1154→                    name=data.get("name", ""),
  1155→                    title=data.get("title", ""),
  1156→                    company=data.get("company", ""),
  1157→                    location=data.get("location", ""),
  1158→                    profile_url=data.get("profile_url", ""),
  1159→                ))
  1160→
  1161→        # Filter out premium placeholders
  1162→        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
  1163→
  1164→        logger.info(f"Enterprise: extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
  1165→
  1166→    except Exception as e:
  1167→        logger.error(f"Error extracting enterprise results: {e}")
  1168→
  1169→    return candidates
  1170→

1→"""Message module for sending messages to candidates.
     2→

     6→

    10→

    37→
    38→# Maimai chat URL - navigate directly to chat page

    41→
    42→def _extract_user_id(profile_url: str) -> Optional[str]:
    43→    """Extract dstu/user_id from a Maimai profile URL for direct chat navigation.
    44→
    45→    Only returns IDs that are known to work with the chat URL (u2= parameter).
    46→    Query-param IDs (dstu, u2, egid) are reliable for chat navigation.
    47→    Path-based IDs (/contact/detail/xxx) are NOT the same as chat user IDs
    48→    and should not be used for direct chat URL construction.
    49→    """
    50→    from urllib.parse import urlparse, parse_qs
    51→    parsed = urlparse(profile_url)
    52→    params = parse_qs(parsed.query)
    53→    # Only use query parameter IDs — these are confirmed to work with uh_chat_pc
    54→    for key in ('dstu', 'u2', 'egid'):
    55→        if key in params:
    56→            return params[key][0]
    57→    return None
    58→
    59→
    60→async def _navigate_to_chat(
    61→    page: Page,
    62→    profile_url: Optional[str],
    63→    config,
    64→    browser: BrowserManager,
    65→    maimai_id: str,
    66→    interactive: bool = False,
    67→    discovered_selectors=None,
    68→) -> bool:
    69→    """Navigate to the chat page for a candidate.
    70→
    71→    Tries in order:
    72→    1. Extract user_id from profile_url query params → direct chat URL
    73→    2. Navigate to profile_url, extract user_id from redirected URL → direct chat URL
    74→    3. Click chat button on profile page as fallback
    75→
    76→    If no profile_url is provided, looks up the candidate's profile_url from DB.
    77→
    78→    Args:
    79→        page: Playwright page instance
    80→        profile_url: Candidate's profile URL (may be None)
    81→        config: Config instance
    82→        browser: Browser manager instance
    83→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
    84→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery
    85→        discovered_selectors: Shared DiscoveredSelectors instance
    86→
    87→    Returns:
    88→        True if successfully navigated to chat page
    89→    """
    90→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
    91→
    92→    # Resolve profile URL from DB if not provided
    93→    if not profile_url:
    94→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
    95→            db_candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
    96→            profile_url = db_candidate.profile_url if db_candidate else None
    97→
    98→        if not profile_url:
    99→            raise PermanentFailureError(f"No profile URL for {maimai_id}")
   100→
   101→    # Try extracting user_id directly from profile URL
   102→    user_id = _extract_user_id(profile_url)
   103→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: profile_url={profile_url!r}, extracted user_id={user_id}")
   104→
   105→    if user_id:
   106→        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=user_id)
   107→        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   108→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   109→        return True
   110→
   111→    # Navigate to profile page, then try to extract user_id from resulting URL
   112→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: navigating to profile {profile_url}")
   113→    await retry_navigation(page, profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   114→    await async_random_delay('page_load')
   115→
   116→    current_url = page.url
   117→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: landed on {current_url}")
   118→    redirected_user_id = _extract_user_id(current_url)
   119→    if redirected_user_id:
   120→        logger.info(f"Extracted user_id={redirected_user_id} from page URL, redirecting to chat")
   121→        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=redirected_user_id)
   122→        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   123→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   124→        return True
   125→
   126→    # Fallback: click chat button on profile page
   127→    chat_button_found = await _click_chat_button(page, config)
   128→    if chat_button_found:
   129→        await async_random_delay('action')
   130→        return True
   131→
   132→    # If interactive mode, trigger selector discovery
   133→    if interactive and discovered_selectors is not None and not discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   134→        from src.modules.selector_discovery import discover_chat_page
   135→        console.print("[yellow]Chat button not found. Entering interactive discovery mode...[/yellow]")
   136→        result = await discover_chat_page(page, maimai_id, browser)
   137→        if result.is_populated:
   138→            discovered_selectors.chat_button = result.chat_button
   139→            discovered_selectors.message_input = result.message_input
   140→            discovered_selectors.send_button = result.send_button
   141→            discovered_selectors.chat_url_pattern = result.chat_url_pattern
   142→            discovered_selectors.skip_chat_button = result.skip_chat_button
   143→            discovered_selectors.is_populated = True
   144→            return True
   145→
   146→    console.print("[red]Could not find chat button[/red]")
   147→    await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   148→    return False
   149→

   151→async def _handle_quick_contact(page: Page, content: str) -> Optional[bool]:
   152→    """Handle Maimai's "极速联系" (Quick Contact) page.
   153→
   154→    This page appears instead of regular chat for some candidates. It has a
   155→    category selector, a textarea, and a "提交" (Submit) button.
   156→
   157→    Args:
   158→        page: Playwright page instance
   159→        content: Message content to send
   160→
   161→    Returns:
   162→        True if message was sent via quick contact form,
   163→        False if quick contact page was detected but sending failed,
   164→        None if this is not a quick contact page (caller should continue normal flow)
   165→    """
   166→    try:
   167→        # Detect quick contact page via page title or page content
   168→        is_quick_contact = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   169→            const title = document.title || '';
   170→            const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   171→            return title.includes('极速联系') || bodyText.includes('极速联系');
   172→        }''')
   173→
   174→        if not is_quick_contact:
   175→            return None
   176→
   177→        logger.info("Detected '极速联系' (Quick Contact) page")
   178→
   179→        # Select "招聘类" category if present
   180→        try:
   181→            recruit_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(
   182→                'text=招聘类', timeout=3000
   183→            )
   184→            if recruit_btn:
   185→                await human_click(page, 'text=招聘类')
   186→                await async_random_delay('action')
   187→                logger.debug("Selected '招聘类' category")
   188→        except Exception:
   189→            logger.debug("'招聘类' category button not found, continuing")
   190→
   191→        # Find textarea and fill with message content using Playwright native fill
   192→        try:
   193→            textarea = await page.wait_for_selector('textarea', timeout=5000)
   194→            if not textarea:
   195→                logger.warning("Quick contact: textarea not found")
   196→                return False
   197→        except Exception:
   198→            logger.warning("Quick contact: textarea not found (timeout)")
   199→            return False
   200→
   201→        # Clear and fill using Playwright's native API (avoids Emunium issues)
   202→        await textarea.click()
   203→        await textarea.fill('')
   204→        await textarea.fill(content)
   205→        await async_random_delay('action')
   206→        logger.debug("Filled quick contact textarea")
   207→
   208→        # Click "提交" (Submit) button — race all selectors in parallel via JS,
   209→        # then click the first visible match. Retries up to 2 times.
   210→        submit_selectors = [
   211→            'button:has-text("提交")',
   212→            ':has-text("提交"):not(body):not(div:has(div:has-text("提交")))',
   213→            'text=提交',
   214→            '[class*="submit"]',
   215→            '[class*="btn"]:has-text("提交")',
   216→            'a:has-text("提交")',
   217→            'div:has-text("提交"):not(:has(div:has-text("提交")))',
   218→        ]
   219→
   220→        max_submit_retries = 2
   221→        for submit_attempt in range(1 + max_submit_retries):
   222→            submit_btn = None
   223→            matched_selector = None
   224→
   225→            # Try all selectors concurrently by launching tasks
   226→            async def _try_selector(sel):
   227→                try:
   228→                    elem = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=3000)
   229→                    if elem and await elem.is_visible():
   230→                        return elem, sel
   231→                except Exception:
   232→                    pass
   233→                return None, None
   234→
   235→            tasks = [asyncio.create_task(_try_selector(sel)) for sel in submit_selectors]
   236→            for coro in asyncio.as_completed(tasks):
   237→                elem, sel = await coro
   238→                if elem:
   239→                    submit_btn = elem
   240→                    matched_selector = sel
   241→                    # Cancel remaining tasks
   242→                    for t in tasks:
   243→                        t.cancel()
   244→                    break
   245→
   246→            if submit_btn and matched_selector:
   247→                logger.debug(f"Quick contact: found submit button with selector: {matched_selector}")
   248→                break
   249→
   250→            if submit_attempt < max_submit_retries:
   251→                logger.debug(f"Quick contact: submit button not found, retry {submit_attempt + 1}")
   252→                await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   253→
   254→        if not submit_btn or not matched_selector:
   255→            logger.warning("Quick contact: submit button not found with any selector after retries")
   256→            return False
   257→
   258→        try:
   259→            await submit_btn.click()
   260→        except Exception:
   261→            try:
   262→                await human_click(page, matched_selector)
   263→            except Exception as click_err:
   264→                logger.warning(f"Quick contact: both click methods failed: {click_err}")
   265→                return False
   266→        await async_random_delay('action')
   267→        logger.info("Quick contact: submitted message")
   268→        return True
   269→
   270→    except Exception as e:
   271→        import traceback
   272→        logger.error(f"Quick contact handling failed: {e}\n{traceback.format_exc()}")
   273→        return False
   274→

   276→async def _detect_vip_paywall(page: Page) -> bool:
   277→    """Detect if a VIP/membership paywall is blocking the current page.
   278→
   279→    Non-VIP accounts may be redirected to a recharge/upgrade page when
   280→    trying to message certain candidates. This checks the page URL and
   281→    visible text for common paywall indicators.
   282→
   283→    Args:
   284→        page: Playwright page instance
   285→
   286→    Returns:
   287→        True if a VIP paywall is detected
   288→    """
   289→    try:
   290→        return await page.evaluate('''() => {
   291→            const url = window.location.href;
   292→            const urlKeywords = ['vip', 'member', 'pay', 'recharge', 'upgrade', 'subscribe'];
   293→            if (urlKeywords.some(kw => url.toLowerCase().includes(kw))) {
   294→                return true;
   295→            }
   296→
   297→            const title = document.title || '';
   298→            const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText.substring(0, 3000) : '';
   299→            const text = title + ' ' + bodyText;
   300→
   301→            const paywallPatterns = [
   302→                '开通会员', '升级会员', '会员专享', '会员权益',
   303→                '充值', '付费', '购买会员', '开通VIP', '升级VIP',
   304→                '立即开通', '立即升级', '立即购买',
   305→                '会员到期', '续费', '解锁', '次数已用完',
   306→                '今日沟通次数', '沟通人数已达上限',
   307→            ];
   308→
   309→            return paywallPatterns.some(p => text.includes(p));
   310→        }''')
   311→    except Exception as e:
   312→        logger.debug(f"VIP paywall detection failed: {e}")
   313→        return False
   314→

   316→async def send_message(
   317→    maimai_id: str,
   318→    template_name: str,
   319→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   320→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   321→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   322→    interactive: bool = False,
   323→    discovered_selectors: Optional['DiscoveredSelectors'] = None,
   324→    _skip_rate_check: bool = False,
   325→    profile_url: Optional[str] = None,
   326→) -> bool:
   327→    """
   328→    Send a message to a candidate.
   329→
   330→    Args:
   331→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
   332→        template_name: Name of message template to use
   333→        variables: Variables to substitute in template
   334→        browser: Browser manager instance
   335→        skip_confirmation: Skip confirmation (only for testing)
   336→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery on failure
   337→        discovered_selectors: Shared DiscoveredSelectors instance for reuse
   338→
   339→    Returns:
   340→        True if message was sent successfully
   341→
   342→    Raises:
   343→        RateLimitExceededError: If rate limit exceeded
   344→        ValidationError: If template or variables invalid
   345→    """
   346→    # Validate inputs
   347→    validate_maimai_id(maimai_id)
   348→
   349→    if browser is None:
   350→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   351→
   352→    config = get_config()
   353→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   354→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   355→
   356→    # Get template
   357→    try:
   358→        template = config.get_template(template_name)
   359→    except Exception as e:
   360→        raise ValidationError(f"Template not found: {template_name}")
   361→
   362→    # Validate template variables
   363→    validate_template_variables(template, variables)
   364→
   365→    # Render message content
   366→    content = render_template(template['content'], variables)
   367→
   368→    # Get candidate info for display
   369→    candidate_info = _get_candidate_info(db_manager, maimai_id)
   370→
   371→    # Preview and confirm
   372→    if not skip_confirmation:
   373→        action = await interactive_confirm(content, candidate_info, template_name)
   374→
   375→        if action == 'skip':
   376→            console.print("[yellow]Message skipped[/yellow]")
   377→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'cancelled')
   378→            return False
   379→
   380→        elif action == 'edit':
   381→            # Allow user to edit content
   382→            content = await edit_message(content)
   383→            if content is None:
   384→                console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled[/yellow]")
   385→                return False
   386→
   387→            # Re-confirm after edit
   388→            action = await interactive_confirm(content, candidate_info, template_name)
   389→            if action != 'send':
   390→                console.print("[yellow]Message skipped[/yellow]")
   391→                return False
   392→
   393→        elif action != 'send':
   394→            console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled[/yellow]")
   395→            return False
   396→
   397→    # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval) - skip when called from batch
   398→    if not _skip_rate_check:
   399→        await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   400→
   401→    # Ensure logged in
   402→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   403→
   404→    try:
   405→        page = browser.page
   406→
   407→        # If we have populated discovered selectors, use them directly
   408→        if discovered_selectors and discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   409→            from src.modules.selector_discovery import apply_discovered_selectors
   410→            success = await apply_discovered_selectors(
   411→                page, maimai_id, discovered_selectors, content
   412→            )
   413→            if success:
   414→                rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   415→                    'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   416→                    'template': template_name
   417→                })
   418→                _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   419→                console.print("[green]Message sent successfully![/green]")
   420→                return True
   421→            else:
   422→                console.print("[red]Failed to send with discovered selectors[/red]")
   423→                await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   424→                _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   425→                return False
   426→
   427→        nav_ok = await _navigate_to_chat(
   428→            page, profile_url, config, browser, maimai_id,
   429→            interactive, discovered_selectors,
   430→        )
   431→        if not nav_ok:
   432→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   433→            return False
   434→
   435→        # Check for "等待回应" (Awaiting Response) — already messaged this candidate
   436→        try:
   437→            awaiting = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   438→                const text = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   439→                return text.includes('等待回应') || text.includes('等待对方回复');
   440→            }''')
   441→            if awaiting:
   442→                logger.info(f"Candidate {maimai_id} already messaged (awaiting response), skipping")
   443→                console.print(f"[yellow]Already messaged {maimai_id} (等待回应), skipping[/yellow]")
   444→                _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'cancelled')
   445→                return False
   446→        except Exception:
   447→            pass
   448→
   449→        # Check for "极速联系" (Quick Contact) page
   450→        qc_result = await _handle_quick_contact(page, content)
   451→        if qc_result is True:
   452→            rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   453→                'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   454→                'template': template_name,
   455→                'mode': 'quick_contact',
   456→            })
   457→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   458→            console.print("[green]Message sent via Quick Contact![/green]")
   459→            return True
   460→        elif qc_result is False:
   461→            console.print("[red]Quick Contact page detected but send failed[/red]")
   462→            await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_qc_{maimai_id}")
   463→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   464→            return False
   465→        # qc_result is None → not a quick contact page, continue normal flow
   466→
   467→        # If interactive discovery succeeded, apply discovered selectors
   468→        if discovered_selectors and discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   469→            from src.modules.selector_discovery import apply_discovered_selectors
   470→            success = await apply_discovered_selectors(
   471→                page, maimai_id, discovered_selectors, content
   472→            )
   473→            if success:
   474→                rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   475→                    'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   476→                    'template': template_name
   477→                })
   478→                _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   479→                console.print("[green]Message sent successfully![/green]")
   480→                return True
   481→
   482→        # Check for existing conversation to avoid duplicate greetings
   483→        has_existing = await _check_existing_conversation(page, maimai_id)
   484→        if has_existing:
   485→            console.print(f"[yellow]Existing conversation detected with {maimai_id}. Skipping to avoid duplicate.[/yellow]")
   486→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'cancelled')
   487→            return False
   488→
   489→        # Find message input and type message
   490→        input_found = await _type_message(page, config, content)
   491→        if not input_found:
   492→            console.print("[red]Could not find message input[/red]")
   493→            await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   494→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   495→            return False
   496→
   497→        await async_random_delay('action')
   498→
   499→        # Click send button
   500→        sent = await _click_send_button(page, config)
   501→        if not sent:
   502→            console.print("[red]Could not send message[/red]")
   503→            await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   504→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   505→            return False
   506→
   507→        # Check if clicking send triggered a VIP paywall popup
   508→        await asyncio.sleep(1)
   509→        if await _detect_vip_paywall(page):
   510→            console.print(f"[yellow]VIP paywall popup appeared after send for {maimai_id}, skipping[/yellow]")
   511→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'cancelled')
   512→            raise PermanentFailureError(f"VIP paywall detected for {maimai_id}")
   513→
   514→        # Verify message was actually sent
   515→        verified = await _verify_message_sent(page, content)
   516→        if not verified:
   517→            logger.warning(f"Message to {maimai_id}: send button clicked but could not verify delivery")
   518→            console.print("[yellow]Warning: Message send could not be verified. Marking as unverified.[/yellow]")
   519→            await browser.screenshot(f"message_unverified_{maimai_id}")
   520→            # Still log as sent but with unverified note in details
   521→            rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   522→                'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   523→                'template': template_name,
   524→                'verified': False,
   525→            })
   526→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   527→            console.print("[yellow]Message marked as sent (unverified)[/yellow]")
   528→            return True
   529→
   530→        # Log action
   531→        rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   532→            'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   533→            'template': template_name,
   534→            'verified': True,
   535→        })
   536→
   537→        # Log message to database
   538→        _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   539→
   540→        console.print("[green]Message sent and verified![/green]")
   541→        return True
   542→
   543→    except PermanentFailureError:
   544→        raise
   545→    except Exception as e:
   546→        logger.error(f"Error sending message: {e}")
   547→        await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   548→        _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   549→        raise

   552→async def send_message_batch(
   553→    candidates: List[dict],
   554→    template_name: str,
   555→    common_variables: Dict[str, str],
   556→    browser: BrowserManager,
   557→    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   558→    interactive: bool = False,
   559→) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   560→    """
   561→    Batch send messages to a list of candidates.
   562→
   563→    Flow:
   564→    1. Filter already-messaged candidates
   565→    2. Auto-fill name/company/position variables per candidate
   566→    3. Render message template
   567→    4. Show candidate list + first message preview
   568→    5. Single confirmation
   569→    6. Send one by one, checking rate limit each time
   570→    7. Skip failures and record
   571→    8. Return result stats
   572→
   573→    Args:
   574→        candidates: List of dicts with maimai_id, name, company, title
   575→        template_name: Name of message template
   576→        common_variables: Shared variables (recruiter_name, target_position, etc.)
   577→        browser: Browser manager instance
   578→        skip_messaged: Skip candidates already messaged (default True)
   579→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery on first failure
   580→
   581→    Returns:
   582→        Dict with total, sent, failed, skipped, rate_limited, details
   583→    """
   584→    config = get_config()
   585→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   586→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   587→
   588→    # Get template
   589→    try:
   590→        template = config.get_template(template_name)
   591→    except Exception:
   592→        raise ValidationError(f"Template not found: {template_name}")
   593→
   594→    # Create shared discovered selectors for interactive mode
   595→    if interactive:
   596→        from src.modules.selector_discovery import DiscoveredSelectors
   597→        discovered_selectors = DiscoveredSelectors()
   598→    else:
   599→        discovered_selectors = None
   600→
   601→    results = {
   602→        'total': len(candidates),
   603→        'sent': 0,
   604→        'failed': 0,
   605→        'skipped': 0,
   606→        'rate_limited': 0,
   607→        'details': [],
   608→    }
   609→
   610→    # Filter already-messaged candidates
   611→    send_list = []
   612→    for c in candidates:
   613→        if skip_messaged:
   614→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   615→                existing_msg = session.query(Message).filter_by(
   616→                    candidate_maimai_id=c['maimai_id'],
   617→                    status='sent'
   618→                ).first()
   619→                if existing_msg:
   620→                    results['skipped'] += 1
   621→                    results['details'].append({
   622→                        'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   623→                        'name': c['name'],
   624→                        'status': 'skipped',
   625→                        'reason': 'already messaged',
   626→                    })
   627→                    continue
   628→        send_list.append(c)
   629→
   630→    if not send_list:
   631→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to send messages to.[/yellow]")
   632→        return results
   633→
   634→    # Build preview for first candidate
   635→    first = send_list[0]
   636→    first_vars = {**common_variables, 'name': first['name'], 'company': first['company'], 'position': first['title']}
   637→    first_content = render_template(template['content'], first_vars)
   638→
   639→    # Display summary panel
   640→    from rich.table import Table
   641→
   642→    summary_text = Text()
   643→    summary_text.append("Template: ", style="bold")
   644→    summary_text.append(f"{template_name}\n")
   645→    summary_text.append("Candidates: ", style="bold")
   646→    summary_text.append(f"{len(candidates)} found, {results['skipped']} already messaged\n")
   647→    summary_text.append("Will send to: ", style="bold")
   648→    summary_text.append(f"{len(send_list)} candidates\n\n")
   649→    summary_text.append("Message Preview ", style="bold cyan")
   650→    summary_text.append(f"(first candidate):\n", style="dim")
   651→    summary_text.append("To: ", style="bold cyan")
   652→    recipient = first['name']
   653→    if first.get('title') and first.get('company'):
   654→        recipient += f" ({first['title']} @ {first['company']})"
   655→    summary_text.append(f"{recipient}\n\n")
   656→    summary_text.append(first_content)
   657→
   658→    console.print(Panel(
   659→        summary_text,
   660→        title="Pipeline Summary",
   661→        border_style="green",
   662→        padding=(1, 2)
   663→    ))
   664→
   665→    # Single confirmation (run in executor to avoid nested event loop)
   666→    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
   667→    confirm = await loop.run_in_executor(
   668→        None,
   669→        lambda: questionary.confirm(
   670→            f"Confirm batch send to {len(send_list)} candidates?"
   671→        ).unsafe_ask()
   672→    )
   673→
   674→    if not confirm:
   675→        console.print("[yellow]Batch send cancelled.[/yellow]")
   676→        return results
   677→
   678→    # Send messages one by one
   679→    from rich.progress import Progress, BarColumn, TextColumn as ProgressTextColumn, MofNCompleteColumn
   680→
   681→    with Progress(
   682→        ProgressTextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   683→        BarColumn(),
   684→        MofNCompleteColumn(),
   685→        console=console
   686→    ) as progress:
   687→        task = progress.add_task("Sending messages...", total=len(send_list))
   688→
   689→        max_retries = 2
   690→        rate_limit_hit = False
   691→
   692→        for c in send_list:
   693→            if rate_limit_hit:
   694→                break
   695→
   696→            # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval)
   697→            try:
   698→                await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   699→            except RateLimitExceededError as e:
   700→                console.print(f"\n[yellow]Rate limit reached: {e}[/yellow]")
   701→                remaining = len(send_list) - (results['sent'] + results['failed'])
   702→                results['rate_limited'] = remaining
   703→                results['details'].append({
   704→                    'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   705→                    'name': c['name'],
   706→                    'status': 'rate_limited',
   707→                    'reason': str(e),
   708→                })
   709→                break
   710→
   711→            # Build per-candidate variables
   712→            variables = {
   713→                **common_variables,
   714→                'name': c['name'],
   715→                'company': c['company'],
   716→                'position': c['title'],
   717→            }
   718→            content = render_template(template['content'], variables)
   719→
   720→            # Retry loop for transient failures
   721→            sent = False
   722→            last_error = None
   723→            per_candidate_timeout = 90  # seconds per candidate
   724→            for attempt in range(1 + max_retries):
   725→                try:
   726→                    success = await asyncio.wait_for(
   727→                        send_message(
   728→                            maimai_id=c['maimai_id'],
   729→                            template_name=template_name,
   730→                            variables=variables,
   731→                            browser=browser,
   732→                            skip_confirmation=True,
   733→                            interactive=interactive,
   734→                            discovered_selectors=discovered_selectors,
   735→                            _skip_rate_check=True,
   736→                            profile_url=c.get('profile_url'),
   737→                        ),
   738→                        timeout=per_candidate_timeout,
   739→                    )
   740→
   741→                    if success:
   742→                        results['sent'] += 1
   743→                        results['details'].append({
   744→                            'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   745→                            'name': c['name'],
   746→                            'status': 'sent',
   747→                            'attempts': attempt + 1,
   748→                        })
   749→                        sent = True
   750→                        break
   751→                    else:
   752→                        last_error = "send returned False"
   753→
   754→                except asyncio.TimeoutError:
   755→                    last_error = f"Timed out after {per_candidate_timeout}s"
   756→                    console.print(f"[yellow]Timeout for {c['name']} ({c['maimai_id']}), skipping.[/yellow]")
   757→                    break
   758→                except PermanentFailureError as e:
   759→                    last_error = str(e)
   760→                    console.print(f"[yellow]{e}. Skipping.[/yellow]")
   761→                    break
   762→                except RateLimitExceededError as e:
   763→                    remaining = len(send_list) - (results['sent'] + results['failed'])
   764→                    results['rate_limited'] = remaining
   765→                    results['details'].append({
   766→                        'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   767→                        'name': c['name'],
   768→                        'status': 'rate_limited',
   769→                        'reason': str(e),
   770→                    })
   771→                    console.print(f"\n[yellow]Rate limit reached: {e}[/yellow]")
   772→                    rate_limit_hit = True
   773→                    break
   774→                except Exception as e:
   775→                    last_error = str(e)
   776→
   777→                # Retry with exponential backoff if not last attempt
   778→                if attempt < max_retries and not rate_limit_hit:
   779→                    from src.utils.delays import get_retry_delay
   780→                    delay = get_retry_delay(attempt, base_delay=3.0, max_delay=30.0)
   781→                    logger.info(f"Retry {attempt + 1}/{max_retries} for {c['name']} in {delay:.1f}s")
   782→                    await asyncio.sleep(delay)
   783→
   784→            if not sent and not rate_limit_hit:
   785→                actual_attempts = attempt + 1
   786→                results['failed'] += 1
   787→                results['details'].append({
   788→                    'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   789→                    'name': c['name'],
   790→                    'status': 'failed',
   791→                    'reason': last_error,
   792→                    'attempts': actual_attempts,
   793→                })
   794→                logger.error(f"Failed to send message to {c['name']} after {actual_attempts} attempt(s): {last_error}")
   795→
   796→            progress.advance(task)
   797→
   798→            # Human-like delay between messages
   799→            await async_random_delay('message')
   800→
   801→    return results
   802→
   803→
   804→def render_template(template_content: str, variables: Dict[str, str]) -> str:
   805→    """
   806→    Render template with variables.
   807→
   808→    Maimai chat is plain text, so values are substituted as-is without
   809→    HTML escaping (which would produce visible & entities in chat).
   810→
   811→    Args:
   812→        template_content: Template string with {variable} placeholders
   813→        variables: Variable values to substitute
   814→
   815→    Returns:
   816→        Rendered message content
   817→    """
   818→    content = template_content
   819→    for key, value in variables.items():
   820→        content = content.replace(f"{{{key}}}", str(value))
   821→    return content
   822→
   823→
   824→def preview_message(
   825→    template_name: str,
   826→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   827→    candidate_info: Optional[Dict] = None
   828→) -> str:
   829→    """
   830→    Preview a message without sending.
   831→
   832→    Args:
   833→        template_name: Name of template
   834→        variables: Variables for template
   835→        candidate_info: Optional candidate info for context
   836→
   837→    Returns:
   838→        Rendered message content
   839→    """
   840→    config = get_config()
   841→    template = config.get_template(template_name)
   842→    content = render_template(template['content'], variables)
   843→
   844→    # Display preview
   845→    display_message_preview(content, candidate_info, template_name)
   846→
   847→    return content
   848→
   849→
   850→def display_message_preview(
   851→    content: str,
   852→    candidate_info: Optional[Dict] = None,
   853→    template_name: Optional[str] = None
   854→) -> None:
   855→    """
   856→    Display formatted message preview in terminal.
   857→
   858→    Args:
   859→        content: Message content
   860→        candidate_info: Optional candidate info
   861→        template_name: Optional template name
   862→    """
   863→    # Build recipient line
   864→    if candidate_info:
   865→        recipient = f"{candidate_info.get('name', 'Unknown')}"
   866→        if candidate_info.get('title') and candidate_info.get('company'):
   867→            recipient += f" ({candidate_info['title']} @ {candidate_info['company']})"
   868→    else:
   869→        recipient = "Unknown recipient"
   870→
   871→    # Create panel
   872→    title = "Message Preview"
   873→    if template_name:
   874→        title += f" [{template_name}]"
   875→
   876→    panel_content = Text()
   877→    panel_content.append("To: ", style="bold cyan")
   878→    panel_content.append(recipient + "\n\n")
   879→    panel_content.append(content)
   880→
   881→    console.print(Panel(
   882→        panel_content,
   883→        title=title,
   884→        border_style="cyan",
   885→        padding=(1, 2)
   886→    ))
   887→

   889→async def interactive_confirm(
   890→    content: str,
   891→    candidate_info: Optional[Dict] = None,
   892→    template_name: Optional[str] = None
   893→) -> str:
   894→    """
   895→    Show interactive confirmation dialog.
   896→
   897→    Args:
   898→        content: Message content to confirm
   899→        candidate_info: Optional candidate info
   900→        template_name: Optional template name
   901→
   902→    Returns:
   903→        Action string: 'send', 'edit', or 'skip'
   904→    """
   905→    # Display preview
   906→    display_message_preview(content, candidate_info, template_name)
   907→
   908→    console.print()
   909→
   910→    # Interactive prompt
   911→    choices = [
   912→        questionary.Choice("Send message", value="send"),
   913→        questionary.Choice("Edit content", value="edit"),
   914→        questionary.Choice("Skip (don't send)", value="skip"),
   915→    ]
   916→
   917→    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
   918→    action = await loop.run_in_executor(
   919→        None,
   920→        lambda: questionary.select(
   921→            "What would you like to do?",
   922→            choices=choices,
   923→            style=questionary.Style([
   924→                ('selected', 'fg:green bold'),
   925→                ('pointer', 'fg:green bold'),
   926→                ('highlighted', 'fg:green'),
   927→            ])
   928→        ).unsafe_ask()
   929→    )
   930→
   931→    return action or 'skip'
   932→
   933→
   934→async def edit_message(content: str) -> Optional[str]:
   935→    """
   936→    Allow user to edit message content.
   937→
   938→    Args:
   939→        content: Original content
   940→
   941→    Returns:
   942→        Edited content or None if cancelled
   943→    """
   944→    console.print("\n[dim]Enter new message content (Ctrl+D to finish, Ctrl+C to cancel):[/dim]")
   945→
   946→    try:
   947→        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
   948→        edited = await loop.run_in_executor(
   949→            None,
   950→            lambda: questionary.text(
   951→                "Message:",
   952→                default=content,
   953→                multiline=True
   954→            ).unsafe_ask()
   955→        )
   956→
   957→        return edited
   958→    except KeyboardInterrupt:
   959→        return None
   960→

   962→async def _find_element_by_selectors(page: Page, selectors: List[str], timeout: int = 3000):
   963→    """Try multiple selectors and return the first matching element.
   964→
   965→    Args:
   966→        page: Playwright page instance
   967→        selectors: List of CSS selectors to try in order
   968→        timeout: Timeout per selector in ms
   969→
   970→    Returns:
   971→        Tuple of (element, selector) or (None, None) if not found
   972→    """
   973→    for selector in selectors:
   974→        try:
   975→            elem = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=timeout)
   976→            if elem:
   977→                return elem, selector
   978→        except Exception:
   979→            continue
   980→    return None, None
   981→

   983→async def _click_chat_button(page: Page, config) -> bool:
   984→    """Find and click chat/message button, then wait for navigation to chat page."""
   985→    selectors = [
   986→        config.get_selector('message.chat_button'),
   987→        'button[class*="chat"]',
   988→        '[class*="message-btn"]',
   989→        'button:has-text("极速联系")',
   990→        'button:has-text("立即沟通")',
   991→        'button:has-text("发消息")',
   992→        'button:has-text("私信")',
   993→        'button:has-text("聊天")',
   994→    ]
   995→
   996→    url_before = page.url
   997→
   998→    for selector in selectors:
   999→        try:
  1000→            button = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=3000)
  1001→            if button:
  1002→                await human_click(page, selector)
  1003→                logger.debug(f"Clicked chat button: {selector}")
  1004→
  1005→                # Wait for navigation or page change after clicking
  1006→                try:
  1007→                    # Wait for URL change (chat page transition) or new content load
  1008→                    await page.wait_for_url(
  1009→                        lambda url: url != url_before,
  1010→                        timeout=8000,
  1011→                    )
  1012→                    logger.debug(f"Page navigated to: {page.url}")
  1013→                except Exception:
  1014→                    # URL may not change if chat opens as overlay/modal
  1015→                    logger.debug("URL did not change after chat button click, checking for chat panel")
  1016→
  1017→                # Wait for chat-related elements to appear (input or conversation area)
  1018→                chat_ready_selectors = [
  1019→                    'textarea', '[contenteditable="true"]',
  1020→                    '[class*="chat-container"]', '[class*="chat-content"]',
  1021→                    '[class*="message-list"]', '[class*="im-message"]',
  1022→                ]
  1023→                for chat_sel in chat_ready_selectors:
  1024→                    try:
  1025→                        await page.wait_for_selector(chat_sel, timeout=5000)
  1026→                        logger.debug(f"Chat page ready, found: {chat_sel}")
  1027→                        return True
  1028→                    except Exception:
  1029→                        continue
  1030→
  1031→                # If we got here, button was clicked but no chat UI detected
  1032→                # Still return True since the button was found and clicked
  1033→                logger.warning("Chat button clicked but chat UI not detected")
  1034→                return True
  1035→        except Exception:
  1036→            continue
  1037→
  1038→    logger.warning("Chat button not found")
  1039→    return False
  1040→
  1041→
  1042→async def _type_message(page: Page, config, content: str) -> bool:
  1043→    """Find message input and type content.
  1044→
  1045→    Uses progressively broader selectors. Broad selectors (bare textarea,
  1046→    contenteditable) are only tried when the current URL looks like a chat page
  1047→    to avoid typing into unrelated inputs (e.g. search bars on profile pages).
  1048→    """
  1049→    # Chat-specific selectors (always safe to try)
  1050→    chat_selectors = [
  1051→        config.get_selector('message.message_input'),
  1052→        'textarea[class*="chat"]',
  1053→        'textarea[class*="message"]',
  1054→        'textarea[class*="im-"]',
  1055→        '[class*="chat"] [contenteditable="true"]',
  1056→        '[class*="im-"] [contenteditable="true"]',
  1057→        '[class*="message"] [contenteditable="true"]',
  1058→    ]
  1059→
  1060→    for selector in chat_selectors:
  1061→        try:
  1062→            input_elem = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=3000)
  1063→            if input_elem:
  1064→                await human_type(page, selector, content)
  1065→                logger.debug(f"Typed message in: {selector}")
  1066→                return True
  1067→        except Exception as e:
  1068→            logger.debug(f"Chat selector '{selector}' failed: {e}")
  1069→            continue
  1070→
  1071→    # Broad selectors — only try if URL suggests we're on a chat page
  1072→    current_url = page.url
  1073→    is_chat_page = any(kw in current_url for kw in ('chat', 'im/', 'uh_chat', 'message'))
  1074→
  1075→    if is_chat_page:
  1076→        broad_selectors = [
  1077→            '[contenteditable="true"]',
  1078→            'textarea',
  1079→        ]
  1080→        for selector in broad_selectors:
  1081→            try:
  1082→                input_elem = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=3000)
  1083→                if input_elem:
  1084→                    await human_type(page, selector, content)
  1085→                    logger.debug(f"Typed message in (broad, chat URL): {selector}")
  1086→                    return True
  1087→            except Exception as e:
  1088→                logger.debug(f"Broad selector '{selector}' failed: {e}")
  1089→                continue
  1090→
  1091→    logger.warning(f"Message input not found (is_chat_page={is_chat_page}, url={current_url})")
  1092→    return False
  1093→
  1094→
  1095→async def _click_send_button(page: Page, config) -> bool:
  1096→    """Find and click send button."""
  1097→    selectors = [
  1098→        config.get_selector('message.send_button'),
  1099→        'button[class*="send"]',
  1100→        'button:has-text("提交")',
  1101→        'button:has-text("发送")',
  1102→        'button:has-text("Send")',
  1103→        '[class*="send-btn"]',
  1104→    ]
  1105→
  1106→    button, selector = await _find_element_by_selectors(page, selectors)
  1107→    if button:
  1108→        await human_click(page, selector)
  1109→        logger.debug(f"Clicked send button: {selector}")
  1110→        await async_random_delay('action')
  1111→        return True
  1112→
  1113→    logger.warning("Send button not found")
  1114→    return False
  1115→

  1117→async def _verify_message_sent(page: Page, content: str, timeout: int = 5000) -> bool:
  1118→    """
  1119→    Verify that a message was actually sent by checking the conversation area.
  1120→
  1121→    Polls up to `timeout` ms with short intervals to handle async rendering.
  1122→
  1123→    Checks for:
  1124→    1. The sent message content appearing in the conversation
  1125→    2. The message input being cleared (indicating successful send)
  1126→    3. A sent/delivered indicator element
  1127→
  1128→    Args:
  1129→        page: Playwright page instance
  1130→        content: The message content that was sent
  1131→        timeout: Max time to wait for verification in ms
  1132→
  1133→    Returns:
  1134→        True if message send was verified
  1135→    """
  1136→    import asyncio
  1137→    import time
  1138→
  1139→    # Short snippet for matching (first 20 chars, avoid template artifacts)
  1140→    snippet = content[:20].strip()
  1141→
  1142→    poll_interval_ms = 500
  1143→    deadline = time.monotonic() + timeout / 1000.0
  1144→
  1145→    while True:
  1146→        try:
  1147→            # Strategy 1: Check if message content appears in conversation area
  1148→            verified = await page.evaluate('''(snippet) => {
  1149→                const chatSelectors = [
  1150→                    '[class*="message-list"]',
  1151→                    '[class*="chat-content"]',
  1152→                    '[class*="conversation"]',
  1153→                    '[class*="msg-list"]',
  1154→                    '[class*="im-message"]',
  1155→                    '[class*="chat-msg"]',
  1156→                ];
  1157→
  1158→                for (const sel of chatSelectors) {
  1159→                    const container = document.querySelector(sel);
  1160→                    if (container && container.textContent.includes(snippet)) {
  1161→                        return true;
  1162→                    }
  1163→                }
  1164→
  1165→                // Fallback: scan leaf-ish elements in the lower portion of the page
  1166→                const viewportHeight = window.innerHeight;
  1167→                const elements = document.querySelectorAll('div, p, span');
  1168→                for (const el of elements) {
  1169→                    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
  1170→                    if (rect.top > viewportHeight * 0.3 && el.textContent.includes(snippet)) {
  1171→                        if (el.textContent.length < snippet.length + 200) {
  1172→                            return true;
  1173→                        }
  1174→                    }
  1175→                }
  1176→
  1177→                return false;
  1178→            }''', snippet)
  1179→
  1180→            if verified:
  1181→                logger.debug("Message send verified: content found in conversation")
  1182→                return True
  1183→
  1184→            # Strategy 2: Check if input was cleared (indicates successful send)
  1185→            input_cleared = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1186→                const inputs = document.querySelectorAll(
  1187→                    'textarea, [contenteditable="true"], input[type="text"]'
  1188→                );
  1189→                for (const input of inputs) {
  1190→                    const rect = input.getBoundingClientRect();
  1191→                    if (rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0) {
  1192→                        const value = input.value || input.textContent || '';
  1193→                        if (value.trim() === '') {
  1194→                            return true;
  1195→                        }
  1196→                    }
  1197→                }
  1198→                return false;
  1199→            }''')
  1200→
  1201→            if input_cleared:
  1202→                logger.debug("Message send verified: input field was cleared")
  1203→                return True
  1204→
  1205→            # Strategy 3: Check for sent/delivered indicators
  1206→            sent_indicators = [
  1207→                '[class*="sent"]',
  1208→                '[class*="delivered"]',
  1209→                '[class*="success"]',
  1210→                '[class*="msg-status"]',
  1211→            ]
  1212→            for selector in sent_indicators:
  1213→                try:
  1214→                    indicator = await page.query_selector(selector)
  1215→                    if indicator and await indicator.is_visible():
  1216→                        logger.debug(f"Message send verified: indicator found ({selector})")
  1217→                        return True
  1218→                except Exception:
  1219→                    continue
  1220→
  1221→        except Exception as e:
  1222→            logger.warning(f"Message verification poll failed: {e}")
  1223→
  1224→        # Check if we've exceeded the deadline
  1225→        if time.monotonic() >= deadline:
  1226→            break
  1227→
  1228→        await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_ms / 1000.0)
  1229→
  1230→    logger.warning("Could not verify message was sent after polling")
  1231→    return False
  1232→
  1233→
  1234→async def _check_existing_conversation(page: Page, maimai_id: str) -> bool:
  1235→    """
  1236→    Check if there's already an existing conversation with this candidate.
  1237→
  1238→    Checks for actual user message bubbles (not system prompts/tips) in the
  1239→    conversation area.
  1240→
  1241→    Args:
  1242→        page: Playwright page instance
  1243→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
  1244→
  1245→    Returns:
  1246→        True if an existing conversation was detected
  1247→    """
  1248→    try:
  1249→        has_conversation = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1250→            // Look for conversation message containers
  1251→            const chatSelectors = [
  1252→                '[class*="message-list"]',
  1253→                '[class*="chat-content"]',
  1254→                '[class*="conversation"]',
  1255→                '[class*="msg-list"]',
  1256→                '[class*="im-message"]',
  1257→                '[class*="chat-msg"]',
  1258→                '[class*="chat-record"]',
  1259→            ];
  1260→
  1261→            // System/tip patterns that should NOT count as existing conversation
  1262→            const systemPatterns = [
  1263→                '还不是好友', '添加好友', '发送好友申请', '对方未回复',
  1264→                '以上是打招呼内容', '暂无消息', '开始聊天', '你们已经是好友',
  1265→                '系统消息', '温馨提示', '安全提示', '注意事项',
  1266→                '开启招呼语', '求职意向', '目前情况', '竞业点',
  1267→                '欢迎联系', '不感兴趣',
  1268→            ];
  1269→
  1270→            const isSystemText = (text) => {
  1271→                const t = text.trim();
  1272→                if (t.length < 5) return true;  // Too short to be a real message
  1273→                return systemPatterns.some(p => t.includes(p));
  1274→            };
  1275→
  1276→            for (const sel of chatSelectors) {
  1277→                const container = document.querySelector(sel);
  1278→                if (!container) continue;
  1279→
  1280→                // Strategy 1: Look for message bubble elements
  1281→                const bubbleSelectors = [
  1282→                    '[class*="msg-item"]', '[class*="message-item"]',
  1283→                    '[class*="bubble"]', '[class*="chat-item"]',
  1284→                    '[class*="msg-bubble"]', '[class*="chat-bubble"]',
  1285→                ];
  1286→                for (const bSel of bubbleSelectors) {
  1287→                    const bubbles = container.querySelectorAll(bSel);
  1288→                    // Filter out system/tip bubbles
  1289→                    let realMessageCount = 0;
  1290→                    for (const bubble of bubbles) {
  1291→                        const text = bubble.textContent.trim();
  1292→                        if (text.length > 5 && !isSystemText(text)) {
  1293→                            realMessageCount++;
  1294→                        }
  1295→                    }
  1296→                    if (realMessageCount > 0) {
  1297→                        return true;
  1298→                    }
  1299→                }
  1300→
  1301→                // Strategy 2: If no bubble selectors matched, check direct children
  1302→                // that look like message blocks (not system tips)
  1303→                const children = container.children;
  1304→                let realChildCount = 0;
  1305→                for (const child of children) {
  1306→                    const text = child.textContent.trim();
  1307→                    // Must have meaningful content and not be a system message
  1308→                    if (text.length > 10 && !isSystemText(text)) {
  1309→                        // Check it's not a timestamp-only or status-only element
  1310→                        if (child.querySelector('img[class*="avatar"]') || text.length > 20) {
  1311→                            realChildCount++;
  1312→                        }
  1313→                    }
  1314→                }
  1315→                if (realChildCount > 0) {
  1316→                    return true;
  1317→                }
  1318→            }
  1319→            return false;
  1320→        }''')
  1321→
  1322→        if has_conversation:
  1323→            logger.info(f"Existing conversation detected for {maimai_id}")
  1324→        return has_conversation
  1325→
  1326→    except Exception as e:
  1327→        # On error, assume conversation exists (safe side: avoid duplicate messages)
  1328→        logger.warning(f"Conversation check failed for {maimai_id}: {e} — assuming existing conversation")
  1329→        return True
  1330→
  1331→
  1332→def _get_candidate_info(db_manager, maimai_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
  1333→    """Get candidate info from database."""
  1334→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
  1335→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
  1336→        if candidate:
  1337→            return {
  1338→                'name': candidate.name,
  1339→                'title': candidate.title,
  1340→                'company': candidate.company,
  1341→            }
  1342→        return None
  1343→
  1344→
  1345→def _log_message(
  1346→    db_manager,
  1347→    maimai_id: str,
  1348→    template_name: str,
  1349→    content: str,
  1350→    status: str
  1351→) -> None:
  1352→    """Log message to database. Creates a minimal Candidate if needed for FK."""
  1353→    try:
  1354→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
  1355→            # Ensure candidate exists for FK constraint
  1356→            existing = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
  1357→            if not existing:
  1358→                session.add(Candidate(maimai_id=maimai_id))
  1359→                session.flush()
  1360→
  1361→            message = Message(
  1362→                candidate_maimai_id=maimai_id,
  1363→                template_name=template_name,
  1364→                content=content,
  1365→                status=status,
  1366→                sent_at=datetime.utcnow() if status == 'sent' else None
  1367→            )
  1368→            session.add(message)
  1369→            logger.debug(f"Logged message to {maimai_id}: {status}")
  1370→    except Exception as e:
  1371→        logger.warning(
  1372→            f"AUDIT FAILURE: Failed to log message to {maimai_id} (status={status}): {e}. "
  1373→            f"This candidate may be re-messaged on next run."
  1374→        )
  1375→
  1376→

  1378→# Enterprise inline messaging (Path B)
